tipRules.tip: Fish a weightless soft stickbait on braid over thick matted weeds — almost like fishing a frog, but you can let it do its wiggle in weed openings and still yard fish out of cover
Peg a sinker to a stickbait for a great big-bass bait when flipping grass and penetrating into pockets where big fish roam

knowledge.insight: Line choice affects stickbait presentation: monofilament makes the bait float more, fluorocarbon makes it sink quicker. Braid is often overlooked but useful for fishing weightless stickbaits over thick matted weeds
Wacky rig stickbait works best for a slightly more aggressive retrieve. Weedless/Texas rig with no weight is a much more subtle approach with a very subtle wiggle
